content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Accepted the proposed amendment because the current routing can send an approved review with only non-restart classified findings into ApplyFixes despite having nothing current-bead-scoped to remediate.

## Votes

- `fr-15-0c185672`: Accept
  The code confirms the defect: validation_follow_ups() includes all classified findings, while build_queued_amendments()/build_recorded_follow_ups() later filter to classifications where triggers_restart() is true. skip_next_apply_fixes_reason() only handles Approved when both findings and follow-ups are empty, and its deferred-only branch excludes Approved. Therefore an Approved review containing only informational, covered-by-existing-bead, or propose-new-bead findings will not be skipped and can enter ApplyFixes with no actionable current-bead fix. Extending the deferred/no-restart skip to Approved outcomes is correct and aligns the routing with the classification contract.
